title: Child murdered on Christmas, accused in court
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The 19-year-old arrested in connection with the murder of a 13-year-old boy in Kiewiet Street on Christmas evening, appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on Monday, 29 December.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The 19-year-old arrested in connection with the murder of a 13-year-old boy in Kiewiet Street on Christmas evening, appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on Monday, 29 December."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The body of the boy, who was a former Diaz Primary School learner, was found with a stab wound to the chest behind a house in Kiewiet Street on the morning of 26 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, Southern Cape Police spokesperson Warrant Officer Chris Spies previously told the Mossel Bay Advertiser that it is believed he was killed during an altercation at a house on Christmas evening.","html":"However, Southern Cape Police spokesperson Warrant Officer Chris Spies previously told the Mossel Bay Advertiser that it is believed he was killed during an altercation at a house on Christmas evening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The accused, Sergio Domingo, was arrested by Da Gamaskop Police shortly after the child's body was found.Domingo is set to appear in court again on 12 January for a formal bail application.","html":"The accused, Sergio Domingo, was arrested by Da Gamaskop Police shortly after the child's body was found.
Domingo is set to appear in court again on 12 January for a formal bail application."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous article: Seun (13) se liggaam in Kiewietstraat gevind","html":"Previous article: Seun (13) se liggaam in Kiewietstraat gevind"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Child murdered on Christmas, accused in court
